overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a samurai action game showing a character walking through tall grass along a mountain cliff toward a red maple tree with smoke, set against a stormy sky. The character approaches a stone shrine area and draws their sword at the end.

scene_state.functional_zone: cliffside grass path with rocky overhang

events.description: red maple tree becomes visible through the grass ahead near the smoke

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through swaying tall grass along the cliff edge, approaching distant smoke

entered.detail: large gray rock overhang forming the left boundary of the path
dense tall grass covering the ground, swaying in the wind
dark dramatic storm clouds covering the sky
white smoke rising from a point ahead on the path

segments.scene_description: The character walks through dense tall grass along a narrow cliffside path. A rocky overhang looms on the left while storm clouds fill the sky above. White smoke rises in the distance, and around 8 seconds, a red maple tree becomes visible ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: mountain overlook approach with mixed terrain

events.description: ground surface transitions from tall grass to stone paving and gravel

agents.ego_description: continuing forward as the terrain shifts to rocky stone, approaching the distinctive red maple tree

entered.detail: distinctive Japanese maple with bright red leaves standing on the stone platform
light-colored stone terrace and paving stones replacing the grass
traditional stone lantern structure near the tree

segments.scene_description: The path opens up as the character moves out from under the cliff overhang. The terrain transitions from grass to stone gravel and paving. The red maple tree becomes prominent ahead, situated on a stone platform with a traditional stone lantern visible to the right.

scene_state.functional_zone: mountain shrine overlook with red maple

events.description: character draws katana and raises it toward the smoke and tree

agents.ego_description: approaching the red maple tree and stone shrine, drawing katana and raising it in a ritualistic manner

entered.detail: stone shrine altar with offerings, incense smoke, and ritual objects
fallen red maple leaves scattered across the stone ground

segments.scene_description: The character reaches the stone shrine area beneath the red maple tree. The ground is covered with scattered red leaves and stone paving. At 32 seconds, the character draws their katana and raises it toward the smoking altar in a ceremonial gesture.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement along a narrow cliffside path that gradually opens into a ceremonial stone shrine. It begins with the character walking through dense tall grass beneath a looming rocky overhang and a heavy, storm-filled sky. As the character moves forward, the terrain transitions from wild grass to stone gravel and paving, revealing a prominent red maple tree and a traditional stone lantern ahead. The scene then expands into a wide shrine area covered in scattered red leaves beneath the maple tree. Finally, the camera settles as the character draws their katana and raises it toward a smoking altar in a ceremonial gesture.
